suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Flet AudioRecorder and ft.Audio deprecation in Flet 0.26+. These controls moved to separate packages: flet-audio-recorder and flet-audio. Workers should be aware this is a known deprecation pattern in the codebase.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: stt-faster-whisper (line 69) and speech-ui-controls (line 83) both use deprecated ft.AudioRecorder and ft.Audio. These are pre-existing patterns consistent across the codebase.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add piper-tts voice download command for documentation. Worker used 'python -m piper.download_voices' but this isn't documented in services.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tts-piper-integration handoff shows voice download via subprocess call. Not currently in services.yaml.
